summary: Batch 7 Features Testing Complete - News Sentiment, Paper Trading, Multi-Agent System, Google OAuth. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements and flows verified working.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic, not blocking functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/news/sentiment returns 200 with status='complete'
Backend: Sentiment response has sentiment_score (0-100), market_mood, interpretation
Backend: Sentiment has fear_greed.current, fear_greed.label, fear_greed.history (7 days)
Backend: Sentiment has trending_coins list from CoinGecko
Backend: Sentiment has global_market data (total_market_cap, volume, btc_dominance, etc.)
Backend: GET /api/paper/portfolio returns 200 with balance, total_pnl, total_return_pct, win_rate
Backend: Portfolio returns open_positions and closed_trades arrays
Backend: POST /api/paper/reset resets portfolio to $100,000 initial balance
Backend: POST /api/paper/trade executes buy trade, returns trade_id and updated balance
Backend: Trade appears in open_positions after execution
Backend: POST /api/paper/close closes trade with P&L calculation
Backend: Closed trade appears in closed_trades with pnl and pnl_pct
Backend: Insufficient balance returns 400 error
Backend: GET /api/agents/history returns 200 with history and count
Backend: POST /api/agents/analyze runs multi-agent analysis with 4 agents + JARVIS synthesis
Backend: POST /api/auth/google-session returns 400 for missing session_id
Backend: POST /api/auth/google-session returns 401 for invalid session_id
Backend: Full trading workflow (reset->buy->verify->close->verify stats) passed
Frontend: Login page has 'Continue with Google' button (data-testid='google-login-btn')
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Sentiment' nav link
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Paper Trading' nav link
Frontend: /sentiment page renders with 'Market Sentiment' header
Frontend: Sentiment shows Fear/Greed gauge with score (33/100 Fear)
Frontend: Sentiment shows 7-day Fear & Greed history
Frontend: Sentiment shows 'Trending Now' section with trending coins (Bitcoin, Pudgy Penguins, etc.)
Frontend: Sentiment shows 'Global Crypto Market' with Total Market Cap ($2.60T), 24h Volume, BTC/ETH Dominance
Frontend: /paper-trading page renders with 'Paper Trading' header
Frontend: Paper Trading shows portfolio stats (Balance, Total P&L, Return, Win Rate)
Frontend: 'New Trade' button opens trade modal (data-testid='new-trade-btn')
Frontend: Trade modal has BUY/SELL toggle buttons
Frontend: Trade modal has Symbol, Quantity, Price input fields
Frontend: Trade modal shows Total calculation
Frontend: Executing trade updates balance and shows position in Open Positions
Frontend: Trade History shows closed trades with P&L
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: News sentiment correctly fetches from alternative.me (Fear & Greed) and CoinGecko (trending, global)
Backend: Paper trading properly handles insufficient balance errors with 400 status
Backend: Multi-agent system successfully calls GPT-5.2 for 4 specialized agents + JARVIS synthesis
Backend: Google OAuth endpoint properly validates session_id before processing
Frontend: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing
Frontend: Sentiment page displays real-time fear/greed data with color-coded gauge
Frontend: Paper trading modal form properly calculates and displays total cost
Frontend: Trade positions correctly appear in Open Positions after execution
seed_data_creation: Multiple paper trades created during testing - visible in Trade History section
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 7 features fully tested. News Sentiment at GET /api/news/sentiment (uses free APIs: alternative.me, CoinGecko). Paper Trading CRUD: GET /api/paper/portfolio, POST /api/paper/trade, POST /api/paper/close, POST /api/paper/reset. Initial balance is $100,000. Multi-agent at POST /api/agents/analyze takes 10-20s due to 5 LLM calls. Google OAuth at POST /api/auth/google-session (requires valid Emergent session_id). Frontend data-testids: google-login-btn, sentiment-page, paper-trading-page, new-trade-btn, trade-modal, trade-symbol, trade-quantity, trade-price, execute-trade-btn, refresh-sentiment-btn, reset-portfolio-btn.
